display.purpose: Trevisoft wordmark and rare brand moments.

body.purpose: Project descriptions, footer text, and action labels.

shadows.name: control-glow
shadows.purpose: Header controls and important interactive controls.

motion.name: ease-out
motion.purpose: Project state transitions and ambient motion.

motion.name: reduced-motion
motion.purpose: Reduce animation and transition duration to near-instant.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main project action with saturated blue energy.
components.css: .ds-button-primary { display: inline-grid; min-height: 3.25rem; grid-template-columns: 1fr auto; align-items: center; gap: 0.7rem; border: 1px solid rgb(72 142 255 / 0.9); border-radius: 8px; padding: 0.78rem 1rem; color: #f7f8ff; background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgb(24 92 230 / 0.92), rgb(44 46 177 / 0.95)); font: 700 0.98rem/1.1 'IBM Plex Sans', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; transition: border-color 180ms ease, box-shadow 180ms ease, transform 180ms ease; } .ds-button-primary:hover { transform: translateY(-1px); box-shadow: 0 0 12px rgb(55 124 255 / 0.16); } .ds-button-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #00d9ff; outline-offset: 4px; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Profile and secondary actions on the dark control surface.
components.css: .ds-button-secondary { display: inline-grid; min-height: 3.25rem; grid-template-columns: 1fr auto; align-items: center; gap: 0.7rem; border: 1px solid rgb(141 159 218 / 0.26); border-radius: 8px; padding: 0.78rem 1rem; color: #f7f8ff; background: rgb(8 14 31 / 0.7); font: 700 0.98rem/1.1 'IBM Plex Sans', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; transition: border-color 180ms ease, box-shadow 180ms ease, transform 180ms ease; } .ds-button-secondary:hover { border-color: rgb(86 161 255 / 0.72); transform: translateY(-1px); box-shadow: 0 0 12px rgb(55 124 255 / 0.16); } .ds-button-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #00d9ff; outline-offset: 4px; }

components.name: Project Card
components.description: Scannable project row with one accent and direct action.
components.html:
O
Web App

PixBatch

Convert HEIC, TIFF, PNG, JPG, AVIF, and WEBP images in bulk.

#images#converter#privacy
components.css: .ds-project-card { --accent: #377cff; display: grid; grid-template-columns: 5.5rem minmax(0, 1fr) minmax(10rem, 14rem); align-items: center; gap: 1rem; border: 1px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent), transparent 48%); border-radius: 8px; padding: 1.15rem 1.4rem; color: #f7f8ff; background: radial-gradient(circle at 5rem 50%, color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent), transparent 91%), transparent 15rem), linear-gradient(135deg, rgb(8 17 39 / 0.72), rgb(4 9 23 / 0.66)); font-family: 'IBM Plex Sans', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-project-icon { display: grid; width: 5.5rem; aspect-ratio: 1; place-items: center; border-radius: 8px; border: 1px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent), white 20%); background: linear-gradient(135deg, color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent), #081227 20%), #10215c); font-size: 2rem; } .ds-project-body h3 { margin: 0.6rem 0 0.25rem; font-size: 1.25rem; line-height: 1.1; } .ds-project-body p { margin: 0; color: #c1cae7; line-height: 1.35; } .ds-badge-kind, .ds-tags span { display: inline-flex; border-radius: 999px; padding: 0.2rem 0.55rem; font-size: 0.76rem; font-weight: 700; line-height: 1; } .ds-badge-kind { color: #f7f8ff; background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent), #102060 40%); text-transform: uppercase; } .ds-tags { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 0.45rem; margin-top: 0.8rem; } .ds-tags span { color: #c1cae7; background: rgb(55 72 129 / 0.28); } .ds-card-action { min-height: 3.25rem; border: 1px solid rgb(72 142 255 / 0.9); border-radius: 8px; padding: 0.78rem 1rem; color: #f7f8ff; background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgb(24 92 230 / 0.92), rgb(44 46 177 / 0.95)); font-weight: 700; }

components.name: Badge
components.description: Compact metadata chip for project kind and tags.
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; min-height: 1.35rem; align-items: center; border-radius: 999px; padding: 0.2rem 0.55rem; color: #c1cae7; background: rgb(55 72 129 / 0.28); font: 700 0.76rem/1 'IBM Plex Sans', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; }

components.name: Theme Toggle
components.description: Square icon control using the same 8px control geometry.
components.css: .ds-theme-toggle { display: grid; width: 4rem; height: 4rem; place-items: center; border: 1px solid rgb(141 159 218 / 0.26); border-radius: 8px; color: #f7f8ff; background: rgb(8 14 31 / 0.7); font-size: 1.35rem; transition: border-color 180ms ease, box-shadow 180ms ease, transform 180ms ease; } .ds-theme-toggle:hover { border-color: rgb(86 161 255 / 0.72); transform: translateY(-1px); box-shadow: 0 0 13px rgb(55 124 255 / 0.18); } .ds-theme-toggle:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #00d9ff; outline-offset: 4px; }

narrative.overview:
Trevisoft already has a recognizable synth-lab identity: a luminous moustache mark, a dark technical stage, project cards with per-tool accents, and copy that treats side projects as useful weirdness. The system should preserve that pulse while tightening the craft. Future work should feel less like an effects demo and more like a sharp directory of shipped tools with a little electricity in the walls.

The page is a brand surface, not an app shell. It needs first-impression character for people discovering tools and enough polish for HR teams reviewing Marco's CV. Effects, gradients, glows, and easter eggs can stay only when they help the projects feel memorable and built by a real person.
keyCharacteristics: Neon-lab identity carried by the moustache mark, grid atmosphere, and per-project accent colors.
Compact 8px geometry, crisp borders, and direct calls to action.
Dark mode as the primary theatrical stage, with a usable light theme rather than an afterthought.
Playful details used sparingly so scanning and credibility remain intact.
Project cards that prioritize utility, comparison, and action.

rules.name: The Calibrated Glow Rule
rules.body: Glow is identity, not decoration. One dominant glow field per viewport is enough; avoid stacking wide glows on every card and control.

rules.name: The Project Accent Rule
rules.body: Project accent colors identify individual tools. Do not let every accent compete at once; the card list should still read as one collection.

rules.name: The One Wordmark Rule
rules.body: Audiowide is strongest when it is scarce. Do not use it for every heading.

rules.name: The No Cramming Rule
rules.body: The brand can be compact, but text must never feel squeezed into the card. Increase rhythm before shrinking type.

rules.name: The One Cue Rule
rules.body: A surface may use a border, a glow, or a shadow as its main depth cue. Do not intensify all three at once.

dos: Do preserve the synth-lab identity through the moustache mark, dark stage, and controlled per-project accents.
Do tighten spacing before adding new decoration.
Do make project actions obvious and easy to compare.
Do keep focus states visible and reduced-motion alternatives intact.
Do use light theme as a real polished mode, not a washed-out inversion.
donts: Don't make Trevisoft feel like an overproduced neon arcade.
Don't make Trevisoft feel like a generic AI landing page.
Don't ship a noisy portfolio template, cramped card wall, or decorative effects demo.
Don't let particles, glow, and gradients compete with the projects.
Don't use side-stripe borders, gradient text, nested cards, or modal-first interactions.
Don't add more HR-unfriendly inside jokes as the main read.
